description.p: A Linux-native replacement for Nvidia's Freestyle / Game Filters overlay. Press a hotkey in any Vulkan game and a live-slider panel appears for brightness, contrast, vibrance, sharpening, gamma, and HDR toning — without editing launch options per-game.
The filter engine installs as an implicit Vulkan layer so every Vulkan application on the system picks it up automatically. A system-tray icon keeps the controller daemon alive in the background.
Initial development release. Scaffolding only; not yet functional.
